_comment: Bilbo's Ring (LTR, {3} legendary artifact Equipment): 'During your turn, equipped creature has hexproof and can't be blocked. Whenever equipped creature attacks alone, you draw a card and you lose 1 life. Equip Halfling {1}. Equip {4}.' Setup: the Ring is unattached. Test (a) Equip Halfling {1} onto Delighted Halfling (a Halfling), or Equip {4} onto Grizzly Bears (both sorcery-speed). Test (b) during your turn the equipped creature has hexproof and can't be blocked. Test (c) attack with ONLY the equipped creature -> you draw a card and lose 1 life; attack with the equipped creature AND the other creature (not alone) -> NO draw (the 'attacks alone' trigger now correctly checks the whole attacker set).
